narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Lorimer & Jackson — Corner spot with rotisserie chickens spinning in the window. Named after the Tang family patriarch who dreamed of upgrading from the hole-in-the-wall spots.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Lorimer & Jackson — Corner spot with rotisserie chickens spinning in the window. Named after the Tang family patriarch who dreamed of upgrading from the hole-in-the-wall spots.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗬

Three generations of the Tang family have fed New Yorkers since 1973, when grandfather Yuen Jam Tan opened Peking BBQ in Woodside with nothing but Peruvian recipes and determination. Grandkids Stephanie and John Jr. finally realized their father Johnny's dream — a full-service, full-bar restaurant celebrating their Chifa (Chinese-Peruvian) heritage.

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

🍗 Rotisserie (True to 1970s family recipes)
• Rotisserie Chicken — quarter/half/whole ⭐
  • Half chicken combo w/ yuca fries & salad — $25
  • Quarter chicken combo — ~$18
• Spare Ribs — sweet & funky, "small" 3 slabs — $14 ⭐

🍜 Chifa Classics
• Lomo Saltado — beefy, well-seasoned, rice + fries — $28 ⭐
• Vegetable Lo Mein — bright, crunchy, vegetable-forward — $16
• Arroz Chaufa — Peruvian fried rice
• Jalea — Peruvian seafood platter

🍔 Other
• Johnny's Smashburger — Asian pickles, aji verde
• Wok-charred seasonal greens
• Caesar salad
• Yuca fries

🍨 Dessert
• Chocolate chip cookie — dulce de leche, black sesame, vanilla ice cream ⭐

Note: Everything comes with aji verde, the spicy creamy jalapeño-cilantro sauce that livens everything up.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

🍹 Frozen cocktails — $14
• Chicha Morada (rum) — dark purple, reportedly quite potent ⭐
• Frozen Lychee Pisco Sour ⭐

🍺 Beer
• Tsingtao 12oz — $6

🍸 House cocktails — $15

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$

Dinner for 2: $60-80 (with drinks)

Reservations: Walk-in only (currently)

📞 (718) 535-8554
🌐 johnnysbk.com
📸 @johnnysbk

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Tue–Thu: 5–10pm
Fri–Sat: 5–10:30pm
Sun: 5–10pm
Mon: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Early Tuesday (5-6pm) — no wait, neighborhood-quiet
• Weekend evenings fill with families by 6pm
• Watch the rotisserie through the window while you wait
• 5 blocks from Arnold's place — perfect neighborhood dinner

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗟 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗟

From: The Crosby Street Hotel, 79 Crosby St, New York, NY 10012, USA
To: 642 Lorimer St, Brooklyn, NY 11211

• walking: 1 hour 8 mins • 3.1 mi
• transit: 29 mins • 3.9 mi
• driving: 17 mins • 4.1 mi (traffic: 17 mins)

Best modality: DRIVING ⭐
Why: Fastest available option (17 mins)
